sections.sectionTitle: Abraham' Tangthu in Upna A Thupina Hong Langsak

verses.text: Tu-in eite' pian'na i pupi Abraham' thu ngaihsun ni. Ama tunga thupiang hih bang ahi hi
Abraham in a sepna hangin amah tawh a kipawl dingin Pasian in sang hi leh Abraham in kisialhpih ding thu a nei ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasian' mai-ah Abraham a kisialhna ding bangmah thu omlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
Na a sem mipa a sep thaman kipia hi. Tua a nasepna thaman pen a thalawhsa ahih manin piakkhongin kingaihsutsak lo hi

Ahi zongin Pasian' maipha ngahna dingin nasepna suangloin upna a suang mipa pen Pasian in mimawh kimlai midik hi, ci-in sang ahih manin, amah tawh a kipawl theihna dingin Pasian in tua mipa' upna thupi san' hi
Tua ahih manin nasepna hang tawh hiloin Pasian in mi khat midikin a san'na hangin David in zong a lungdamna thu na gen a
“Pasian in a mawhnate maisakin a khialhnate a selcipsak mite thupha ngah ahi uh hi
Topa in a mawhnate a ciamtehsak loh mipa, thupha ngah ahi hi,” a ci hi

David in a gen hih thupha pen vun ki-atte bek in ngahthei ahi hiam? Hilo hi; vun ki-atlote in zong ngahthei uh hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi,” ci hi, ci-in i gen khinzo hi
Hih mihoihin a san' bang hun ahi hiam? Abraham a vun a ki-at ma ahi hiam, a ki-at zawh ahi hiam? A vun a ki-at khit hiloin a ki-at ma ahi hi

Abraham a vun a ki-at ma-in a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a san'na lahtelna dingin a vun a kinung-at ahi hi. Tua ahih manin vun a ki-atloh hangin a upna uh hangin mihoihin a kisang mite khempeuh-a' dingin Abraham pen kha thu lamah pupi ahi hi
A vun a ki-at ma-in i pupi Abraham a upna hangin a gamtat mah bangin a gamta, a vun a ki-at mite-a' dingin zong Abraham pen pupi mah ahi hi. Tua pen vun ki-at lelna hang hiloin upna hang ahi hi.
Abraham leh a suan a khakte in leitung luah ding hi, ci-in Pasian in thu a ciamna pen Abraham in Thukham a zuihna hang hiloin, a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a san'na hang ahi hi
Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian' thuciamnate a kingah ding hi leh mite' upna pen a kiman'na omloin, Pasian' thuciamnate zong a mawkna suak ding hi
Thukham in Pasian' hehna ding piangsak hi. Ahi zongin thukham om kei leh thukham zuilo cih zong om theilo hi

Tua ahih manin Abraham' suanlekhakte khempeuh tungah Pasian' hehpihna piakkhong a suahtheihna dingin Thukham a zuite bek in ngah loin, Abraham' up bangin a umte in zong a ngahtheihna dingun upna bulphuhin thuciamna kipia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abraham pen kha thu lamah eite khempeuh' pupi ahi hi

Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Minam tampite' pupi dingin ka hong bawl khin hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi. Tua hi a, bangmah a om nailopi a thupiakna tawh a omsak thei, a site a hingsak thei, Abraham in a up Pasian' muhna-ah hih thuciamna kipin a kizang ahi hi

Lai Siangtho sungah, “Na suanlekhakte aksi zahin tam ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin tua bang a pian'theihna ding lametna a om nailopi mahin Abraham in umin lamen ahih manin minam tampite' pupi a suak hi
Abraham kum za khat bang pha dektak ta a, a si dektak ta ahihna leh a zi Sarah a ciin'na thute a theih hangin a upna kiam tuanlo hi
Amah in Pasian' thuciamna muan'lah dingin ngaihsunlo a, a upna khahsuah hetlo hi. A upna hangin thakhauh semsemin Pasian a phat hi
Pasian in a thuciamsa tungsakzo taktak ding hi, ci-in a muang hi
Tua ahih manin, “A upna pen hoihna-in Pasian in a sang hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
“A upna pen hoihna-in kisang,” ci-in a kigelh ciangin ama-a' ding bekin a kigelh hilo hi
Sihna panin i Topa Jesuh a hingsakpa a um eite khempeuh zong i upna hangin mihoihin hong kisang ding hi, ci-in eite-a' dingin zong a kigelh ahi hi
Eite' mawhna hangin a si dingin Jesuh kipia a, Pasian tawh eite i kipawl theihna dingin kihingkik sak hi.
